text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the first race of the Triple Tiara—the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All eyes are on the showdown between Daiwa
Scarlet and Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet, unfazed by either Vodka or
nerves, vows to take first place.
